summary: High-quality consolidation of hook error handling: 7 pre-* and 6 post-* dispatchers now source a shared hook-error-handler.sh library with fail-open semantics. All paths maintain backward compatibility (legacy path fallback in session-misc-functions.sh), with correct canonical path migration to $HOME/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl. RED behavioral test (test-hook-inline-trap-consolidation.sh) comprehensively validates new log path writes across 9 hook function variants. Syntax validation passed for all bash scripts. security_overlay_warranted: no, performance_overlay_warranted: no
